name: Pastsa Fagioli I
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat olive oil in a large pan over medium heat. Add minced garlic and sauté until fragrant.
2. Add crushed tomatoes, salt, and pepper to the pan. Simmer for 15 minutes, stirring occasionally.
3. Stir in oregano and cannellini beans. Continue simmering for an additional 10 minutes.
4. Add cooked ditalini pasta and reserved cooking liquid (if needed). Stir until combined.
5. Let the dish sit for a few minutes before serving.
6. Serve with grated cheese and red pepper flakes to taste.
